scripts.build:win:clean: npm run clean:dist && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.build:portable: npm run clean:dist && electron-builder --win portable --publish never --config.win.artifactName=XenoLauncher-Portable-${version}.exe
scripts.build:release:win: set "XENO_BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist-release" && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never --config.directories.output=dist-release && npm run build:asar-asset && electron-builder --win portable --publish never --config.directories.output=dist-release --config.win.artifactName=XenoLauncher-Portable-${version}.exe
scripts.build:patch:asar: set "XENO_BUILD_OUTPUT_DIR=dist-release" && electron-builder --win --dir --publish never --config.directories.output=dist-release && npm run build:asar-asset
